# libredash admin storage cleanup

Reconcile serving-state snapshots and clean DuckLake storage

## Usage

```sh
libredash admin storage cleanup [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--apply` | bool | `false` | perform destructive cleanup instead of dry-run |
